violations.text: The front door to the outside, located in the dining area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Utensils (fork/spoon) in the (self-service area) are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
Observed floors tiles in the (dry storage) area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2025

Single service utensils were observed stored with the food-lip contact surface facing up. PIC instructed to flip all items so that handle was facing up. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024

Carne asada was observed held at 98 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC elected to disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023
The lowboy unit was observed iced over. Unit was unplugged and food was relocated to other refrigeration. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023
